system.specialQuality: thorns all over, to touch them is to bleed
system.moves:
- Possess thorny plants or vines and shape them into a body
- Cause vicious thorns and spines to sprout from nearby plants
- Dig in deep, make them bleed (messy)

Each thorn on a plant is a sword, bran- dished boldly against a world that would defile its flowers, steal its fruit, and devour its delicate buds. What, then, are the coed- waig? Only Danu’s swords, brandished by the Mother herself in defense of her most beautiful and vulnerable children.
